anti_claim: Health rows route gaps to residual pressure; they do not weaken doctrine or upgrade coverage.

anti_principles.support_scope: anti-principle guard edges resolve violated axioms; failed-principle negation binding remains residual until obligation-level mapping exists

code_loci.support_scope: derived from source relationship edges; path existence is not code correctness, runtime proof, or release authority

concepts.support_scope: concept specimen parity and typed selective neighbours are computed from source-named ids; unresolved or omitted selective edges remain residual pressure

doctrine_kinds.support_scope: derived from standard.governs and skill.acts_on edges; kind handles are walkability nodes, not complete ontology, runtime use, or release authority

capsule_dependency_upstream_parity.relation_direction: paper_module A depends_on paper_module B maps to mechanism(B).upstream_of mechanism(A); the reverse direction is not inferred from depends_on.

mechanisms.support_scope: mechanism selective residuals are typed from source rows plus the relation registry; capsule depends_on evidence classifies upstream residual fillability and confirms dependency mechanisms as upstream_of their consumers, but is not a reverse-edge fill or runtime truth claim.

principles.support_scope: only principles grounded in piloted axiom obligations are computed

receipts.support_scope: derived from receipt_refs on source instances; receipt existence is not proof, and nonlocal path walkability is not runtime correctness, release authority, or source evidence laundering

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Continue corpus migration and source-evidence edge wiring only for currently computed deficits; do not keep closed gap classes in the run queue.
Populate concept and mechanism selective edges from source evidence; do not infer neighbour ids from prose-only specimen roles.
Populate missing organ paper/mechanism/code refs from source evidence, then bind concept/principle/axiom/wires_to edges only when atlas or registry rows name ids.
Author capsule-backed paper-module JSON subject/code/law/dependency edges for legacy-only Markdown rows, then regenerate governed JSON and projections.
Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept neighbours only when source evidence names ids; do not infer missing operational dependencies from prose.
Upgrade legacy/draft standard contracts and bind standard.owns_triad skill edges to governed skill JSON only when source evidence exists.
Resolve code-locus, receipt, and doctrine-kind walkability gaps from source refs; do not treat path or receipt existence as proof.

standards.support_scope: standard JSON files are inventory-backed contract nodes; governed-kind, triad-skill, source-declared used_by_organs, and target-organ admission status are computed separately from contract activation, organ acceptance, or runtime use claims
